detail.description: Sterlin Thompson singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Nick Gonzales.
Sterlin Thompson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Seiya Suzuki. Troy Johnston scores. Brett Sullivan to 2nd.
Sterlin Thompson singles on a line drive to center fielder Garrett Mitchell. Troy Johnston scores. Willi Castro scores. Ezequiel Tovar to 2nd.
Sterlin Thompson singles on a ground ball to second baseman Brice Turang.
Sterlin Thompson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Sal Frelick.
Sterlin Thompson singles on a ground ball to shortstop Ezequiel Duran.
Sterlin Thompson singles on a fly ball to left fielder Wade Meckler.
Sterlin Thompson doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Mike Trout.
Sterlin Thompson singles on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Willi Castro scores. Edouard Julien to 3rd.
Sterlin Thompson doubles (4) on a ground ball to left fielder Ian Happ.
Sterlin Thompson homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field.
Sterlin Thompson homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Sterlin Thompson singles on a ground ball to center fielder Ryan Waldschmidt.
Sterlin Thompson doubles (1) on a line drive to center fielder Jorge Barrosa.
Sterlin Thompson singles on a fly ball to left fielder Alex Call. Troy Johnston scores.
